title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Export-Import Bank of India Act, 1981. (2) It extends to the whole of India. (3) It shall come into force on such date 1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint, and different dates may be appointed for different provisions of this Act.
footnote: 1 1st January 1982, vide notification No. S.O. 919(E), dated 29th December, 1981 (except section 26), see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). 1st March 1982, vide notification No. S.O. 91(E), dated 23rd February, 1982 (in respect of section 26), see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii).
